title: Dripped Out
description: Allowing players to play dripstone sideways
body:
Have you ever thought to yourself "Why can't I use pointed dripstone as a defense mechanism?". Well, this mod is for you! Dripped Out will allow you to place your pointed dripstone sideways to enhance your gaming experience. The sideways pointed dripstone is so sharp that it hurts entities that walk into it so it's a great defense against unwanted monsters.

Need a server? Get 20% off your first month by using promo code "mrbysco"

For questions feel free to join my Discord. ## Want to support us? ##

  -Mrbysco
